tEn: Rethinking the Inception Architecture for Computer Vision
tZh: 重新思考计算机视觉中的Inception架构
sEn: Factorized convolutions and aggressive regularization enable efficient scaling of deep networks, achieving 3.5% top-5 error on ILSVRC 2012.
sZh: 通过分解卷积和激进的正则化，实现了深度网络的高效扩展，在ILSVRC 2012上达到3.5%的top-5错误率。
absEn: Convolutional networks are at the core of most state-of-the-art computer vision solutions for a wide variety of tasks. Since 2014 very deep convolutional networks started to become mainstream, yielding substantial gains in various benchmarks. Although increased model size and computational cost tend to translate to immediate quality gains for most tasks (as long as enough labeled data is provided for training), computational efficiency and low parameter count are still enabling factors for various use cases such as mobile vision and big-data scenarios. Here we explore ways to scale up networks in ways that aim at utilizing the added computation as efficiently as possible by suitably factorized convolutions and aggressive regularization. We benchmark our methods on the ILSVRC 2012 classification challenge validation set demonstrate substantial gains over the state of the art: 21.2% top-1 and 5.6% top-5 error for single frame evaluation using a network with a computational cost of 5 billion multiply-adds per inference and with using less than 25 million parameters. With an ensemble of 4 models and multi-crop evaluation, we report 3.5% top-5 error on the validation set (3.6% error on the test set) and 17.3% top-1 error on the validation set.
absZh: 卷积网络是大多数最先进的计算机视觉解决方案的核心，广泛应用于各种任务。自2014年以来，非常深的卷积网络开始成为主流，在各种基准测试中取得了显著提升。尽管增加模型大小和计算成本通常能立即提升大多数任务的质量（只要有足够的标注数据进行训练），但计算效率和低参数数量仍然是移动视觉和大数据场景等用例的关键因素。本文探索了通过适当的分解卷积和激进的正则化来扩展网络的方法，旨在尽可能高效地利用增加的计算资源。我们在ILSVRC 2012分类挑战验证集上评估了方法，结果表明显著优于现有技术：单帧评估使用计算成本为50亿次乘加、参数少于2500万的网络，top-1错误率为21.2%，top-5错误率为5.6%。使用4个模型的集成和多裁剪评估，我们在验证集上报告了3.5%的top-5错误率（测试集上为3.6%）和17.3%的top-1错误率。

contrib.en: Proposes design principles for scaling CNNs efficiently, including avoiding representational bottlenecks and balancing width/depth.
contrib.zh: 提出了高效扩展CNN的设计原则，包括避免表征瓶颈和平衡宽度与深度。

contrib.en: Introduces factorization of large convolutions into smaller ones (e.g., 5x5 into two 3x3) to reduce computation without loss of expressiveness.
contrib.zh: 引入将大卷积分解为小卷积（如5x5分解为两个3x3）的方法，在保持表达能力的同时降低计算量。

contrib.en: Develops asymmetric convolution factorization (e.g., 1xn followed by nx1) for further computational savings on medium grid sizes.
contrib.zh: 开发了非对称卷积分解（如1xn后接nx1），在中尺寸特征图上进一步节省计算。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that auxiliary classifiers act as regularizers rather than improving gradient flow, especially with batch normalization.
contrib.zh: 证明辅助分类器主要起正则化作用而非改善梯度流动，尤其在批归一化后。

contrib.en: Proposes label-smoothing regularization to prevent overfitting and improve generalization by softening ground-truth labels.
contrib.zh: 提出标签平滑正则化，通过软化真实标签防止过拟合并提升泛化能力。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on ILSVRC 2012 with 21.2% top-1 and 5.6% top-5 error using Inception-v3, while being computationally efficient.
contrib.zh: 在ILSVRC 2012上以Inception-v3达到21.2% top-1和5.6% top-5错误率，同时保持计算高效。

limits.en: Design principles are speculative and require further experimental validation across diverse tasks.
limits.zh: 设计原则是推测性的，需要在不同任务上进一步实验验证。

limits.en: Factorization techniques may not work well on early layers; effectiveness is limited to medium grid sizes.
limits.zh: 分解技术在前几层效果不佳，仅在中尺寸特征图上有效。

limits.en: Label-smoothing introduces a hyperparameter epsilon that may need tuning for different datasets.
limits.zh: 标签平滑引入超参数epsilon，可能需要针对不同数据集调整。

limits.en: The study focuses on image classification; applicability to other vision tasks like detection or segmentation is not fully explored.
limits.zh: 研究聚焦于图像分类，对其他视觉任务（如检测或分割）的适用性未充分探索。

limits.en: Computational cost savings assume specific architectural choices; naive scaling may still lead to inefficiencies.
limits.zh: 计算成本节省依赖于特定架构选择；简单缩放仍可能导致效率低下。

items.en: Convolutional networks are at the core of most state-of-the-art computer vision solutions for a wide variety of tasks. Since 2014 very deep convolutional networks started to become mainstream, yielding substantial gains in various benchmarks. Although increased model size and computational cost tend to translate to immediate quality gains for most tasks (as long as enough labeled data is provided for training), computational efficiency and low parameter count are still enabling factors for various use cases such as mobile vision and big-data scenarios. Here we are exploring ways to scale up networks in ways that aim at utilizing the added computation as efficiently as possible by suitably factorized convolutions and aggressive regularization. We benchmark our methods on the ILSVRC 2012 classification challenge validation set demonstrate substantial gains over the state of the art: 21.2%percent21.221.2\% top-111 and 5.6%percent5.65.6\% top-555 error for single frame evaluation using a network with a computational cost of 555 billion multiply-adds per inference and with using less than 25 million parameters. With an ensemble of 444 models and multi-crop evaluation, we report 3.5%percent3.53.5\% top-555 error and 17.3%percent17.317.3\% top-111 error.
items.zh: 卷积网络是大多数最先进的计算机视觉解决方案的核心，适用于各种任务。自2014年以来，非常深的卷积网络开始成为主流，在各种基准测试中取得了显著提升。尽管增加模型大小和计算成本通常会直接带来大多数任务的质量提升（只要提供足够的标注数据进行训练），但计算效率和低参数数量仍然是移动视觉和大数据场景等各种用例的关键因素。在这里，我们探索通过适当分解的卷积和激进的正则化来扩展网络的方法，旨在尽可能高效地利用增加的计算量。我们在ILSVRC 2012分类挑战验证集上对我们的方法进行了基准测试，结果表明其显著优于现有技术：使用计算成本为50亿次乘加运算且参数少于2500万的网络进行单帧评估，top-1错误率为21.2%，top-5错误率为5.6%。使用4个模型的集成和多裁剪评估，我们报告top-5错误率为3.5%，top-1错误率为17.3%。

items.en: Since the 2012 ImageNet competition [16] winning entry by Krizhevsky et al [9], their network “AlexNet” has been successfully applied to a larger variety of computer vision tasks, for example to object-detection [5], segmentation [12], human pose estimation [22], video classification [8], object tracking [23], and superresolution [3].
items.zh: 自2012年ImageNet竞赛[16]中Krizhevsky等人[9]的获胜网络“AlexNet”以来，该网络已成功应用于大量计算机视觉任务，例如目标检测[5]、分割[12]、人体姿态估计[22]、视频分类[8]、目标跟踪[23]和超分辨率[3]。

items.en: These successes spurred a new line of research that focused on finding higher performing convolutional neural networks. Starting in 2014, the quality of network architectures significantly improved by utilizing deeper and wider networks. VGGNet [18] and GoogLeNet [20] yielded similarly high performance in the 2014 ILSVRC [16] classification challenge. One interesting observation was that gains in the classification performance tend to transfer to significant quality gains in a wide variety of application domains. This means that architectural improvements in deep convolutional architecture can be utilized for improving performance for most other computer vision tasks that are increasingly reliant on high quality, learned visual features. Also, improvements in the network quality resulted in new application domains for convolutional networks in cases where AlexNet features could not compete with hand engineered, crafted solutions, e.g. proposal generation in detection[4].
items.zh: 这些成功激发了一条新的研究方向，专注于寻找性能更高的卷积神经网络。从2014年开始，通过使用更深更宽的网络，网络架构的质量显著提升。VGGNet[18]和GoogLeNet[20]在2014年ILSVRC[16]分类挑战中取得了同样高的性能。一个有趣的观察是，分类性能的提升往往会转化为各种应用领域的显著质量提升。这意味着深度卷积架构的改进可用于提高大多数其他计算机视觉任务的性能，这些任务越来越依赖于高质量的学习视觉特征。此外，网络质量的改进为卷积网络带来了新的应用领域，在这些领域中，AlexNet特征无法与手工设计的解决方案竞争，例如检测中的候选区域生成[4]。

items.en: Although VGGNet [18] has the compelling feature of architectural simplicity, this comes at a high cost: evaluating the network requires a lot of computation. On the other hand, the Inception architecture of GoogLeNet [20] was also designed to perform well even under strict constraints on memory and computational budget. For example, GoogleNet employed only 5 million parameters, which represented a 12×12\times reduction with respect to its predecessor AlexNet, which used 606060 million parameters. Furthermore, VGGNet employed about 3x more parameters than AlexNet.
items.zh: 尽管VGGNet[18]具有架构简单的优点，但代价高昂：评估网络需要大量计算。另一方面，GoogLeNet[20]的Inception架构也被设计为即使在严格的内存和计算预算限制下也能表现良好。例如，GoogleNet仅使用了500万个参数，相比其前身AlexNet（使用了6000万个参数）减少了12倍。此外，VGGNet使用的参数大约是AlexNet的3倍。

items.en: The computational cost of Inception is also much lower than VGGNet or its higher performing successors [6]. This has made it feasible to utilize Inception networks in big-data scenarios[17], [13], where huge amount of data needed to be processed at reasonable cost or scenarios where memory or computational capacity is inherently limited, for example in mobile vision settings. It is certainly possible to mitigate parts of these issues by applying specialized solutions to target memory use [2], [15] or by optimizing the execution of certain operations via computational tricks [10]. However, these methods add extra complexity. Furthermore, these methods could be applied to optimize the Inception architecture as well, widening the efficiency gap again.
items.zh: Inception的计算成本也远低于VGGNet或其更高性能的后续网络[6]。这使得Inception网络在大数据场景[17][13]中变得可行，这些场景需要以合理的成本处理大量数据，或者在内存或计算能力固有受限的场景中，例如移动视觉设置。当然，可以通过应用专门解决方案来缓解部分问题，例如针对内存使用[2][15]或通过计算技巧优化某些操作的执行[10]。然而，这些方法增加了额外的复杂性。此外，这些方法也可以应用于优化Inception架构，从而再次扩大效率差距。

items.en: Still, the complexity of the Inception architecture makes it more difficult to make changes to the network. If the architecture is scaled up naively, large parts of the computational gains can be immediately lost. Also, [20] does not provide a clear description about the contributing factors that lead to the various design decisions of the GoogLeNet architecture. This makes it much harder to adapt it to new use-cases while maintaining its efficiency. For example, if it is deemed necessary to increase the capacity of some Inception-style model, the simple transformation of just doubling the number of all filter bank sizes will lead to a 4x increase in both computational cost and number of parameters. This might prove prohibitive or unreasonable in a lot of practical scenarios, especially if the associated gains are modest. In this paper, we start with describing a few general principles and optimization ideas that that proved to be useful for scaling up convolution networks in efficient ways. Although our principles are not limited to Inception-type networks, they are easier to observe in that context as the generic structure of the Inception style building blocks is flexible enough to incorporate those constraints naturally. This is enabled by the generous use of dimensional reduction and parallel structures of the Inception modules which allows for mitigating the impact of structural changes on nearby components. Still, one needs to be cautious about doing so, as some guiding principles should be observed to maintain high quality of the models.
items.zh: 尽管如此，Inception架构的复杂性使得对网络进行修改更加困难。如果天真地扩展架构，大部分计算增益可能会立即丧失。此外，[20]没有清晰描述导致GoogLeNet架构各种设计决策的贡献因素。这使得在保持效率的同时将其适应新用例变得更加困难。例如，如果认为有必要增加某个Inception风格模型的容量，简单地将所有滤波器组数量加倍将导致计算成本和参数数量增加4倍。这在许多实际场景中可能是禁止或不合理的，尤其是当相关增益有限时。在本文中，我们首先描述一些通用原则和优化思路，这些原则和思路已被证明有助于以高效方式扩展卷积网络。虽然我们的原则不限于Inception类型网络，但在该上下文中更容易观察到它们，因为Inception风格构建块的通用结构足够灵活，可以自然地融入这些约束。这得益于Inception模块中大量使用降维和并行结构，从而可以减轻结构变化对附近组件的影响。尽管如此，仍需谨慎行事，因为应遵循一些指导原则以保持模型的高质量。

items.en: Here we will describe a few design principles based on large-scale experimentation with various architectural choices with convolutional networks. At this point, the utility of the principles below are speculative and additional future experimental evidence will be necessary to assess their accuracy and domain of validity. Still, grave deviations from these principles tended to result in deterioration in the quality of the networks and fixing situations where those deviations were detected resulted in improved architectures in general.
items.zh: 在这里，我们将基于对卷积网络各种架构选择的大规模实验，描述一些设计原则。目前，以下原则的效用是推测性的，需要额外的未来实验证据来评估其准确性和适用范围。然而，严重偏离这些原则往往会导致网络质量下降，而修复检测到这些偏差的情况通常会带来改进的架构。

items.en: Avoid representational bottlenecks, especially early in the network. Feed-forward networks can be represented by an acyclic graph from the input layer(s) to the classifier or regressor. This defines a clear direction for the information flow. For any cut separating the inputs from the outputs, one can access the amount of information passing though the cut. One should avoid bottlenecks with extreme compression. In general the representation size should gently decrease from the inputs to the outputs before reaching the final representation used for the task at hand. Theoretically, information content can not be assessed merely by the dimensionality of the representation as it discards important factors like correlation structure; the dimensionality merely provides a rough estimate of information content.
items.zh: 避免表示瓶颈，尤其是在网络早期。前馈网络可以表示为从输入层到分类器或回归器的无环图。这定义了信息流的明确方向。对于任何将输入与输出分开的切割，可以评估通过该切割的信息量。应避免极端压缩的瓶颈。通常，表示大小应从输入到输出逐渐减小，直到达到用于当前任务的最终表示。理论上，信息内容不能仅通过表示的维度来评估，因为它忽略了相关结构等重要因素；维度仅提供信息内容的粗略估计。

items.en: Higher dimensional representations are easier to process locally within a network. Increasing the activations per tile in a convolutional network allows for more disentangled features. The resulting networks will train faster.
items.zh: 更高维的表示更容易在网络内部局部处理。增加卷积网络中每个图块的激活值允许更解缠的特征。由此产生的网络训练速度更快。

items.en: Spatial aggregation can be done over lower dimensional embeddings without much or any loss in representational power. For example, before performing a more spread out (e.g. 3×3333\times 3) convolution, one can reduce the dimension of the input representation before the spatial aggregation without expecting serious adverse effects. We hypothesize that the reason for that is the strong correlation between adjacent unit results in much less loss of information during dimension reduction, if the outputs are used in a spatial aggregation context. Given that these signals should be easily compressible, the dimension reduction even promotes faster learning.
items.zh: 空间聚合可以在低维嵌入上进行，而不会损失或很少损失表示能力。例如，在执行更分散的（例如3×3）卷积之前，可以在空间聚合之前降低输入表示的维度，而不会预期产生严重的不利影响。我们推测，其原因是相邻单元结果之间的强相关性导致在维度缩减期间信息损失更少，如果输出用于空间聚合上下文的话。鉴于这些信号应该易于压缩，维度缩减甚至促进了更快的学习。

items.en: Balance the width and depth of the network. Optimal performance of the network can be reached by balancing the number of filters per stage and the depth of the network. Increasing both the width and the depth of the network can contribute to higher quality networks. However, the optimal improvement for a constant amount of computation can be reached if both are increased in parallel. The computational budget should therefore be distributed in a balanced way between the depth and width of the network.
items.zh: 平衡网络的宽度和深度。通过平衡每个阶段的滤波器数量和网络深度，可以达到网络的最佳性能。同时增加网络的宽度和深度有助于提高网络质量。然而，对于固定计算量，如果两者并行增加，可以达到最佳改进。因此，计算预算应在网络的深度和宽度之间平衡分配。

items.en: Although these principles might make sense, it is not straightforward to use them to improve the quality of networks out of box. The idea is to use them judiciously in ambiguous situations only.
items.zh: 尽管这些原则可能合理，但直接使用它们来开箱即用地提高网络质量并不简单。想法是仅在模棱两可的情况下审慎使用它们。

full.sec: 3 Factorizing Convolutions with Large Filter Size

items.en: Much of the original gains of the GoogLeNet network [20] arise from a very generous use of dimension reduction. This can be viewed as a special case of factorizing convolutions in a computationally efficient manner. Consider for example the case of a 1×1111\times 1 convolutional layer followed by a 3×3333\times 3 convolutional layer. In a vision network, it is expected that the outputs of near-by activations are highly correlated. Therefore, we can expect that their activations can be reduced before aggregation and that this should result in similarly expressive local representations.
items.zh: GoogLeNet网络[20]的许多原始增益来自于大量使用降维。这可以看作是以计算高效的方式分解卷积的一个特例。例如，考虑一个1×1卷积层后接一个3×3卷积层的情况。在视觉网络中，预期附近激活的输出是高度相关的。因此，我们可以预期它们的激活可以在聚合之前减少，并且这应该会产生类似表达能力的局部表示。

items.en: Here we explore other ways of factorizing convolutions in various settings, especially in order to increase the computational efficiency of the solution. Since Inception networks are fully convolutional, each weight corresponds to one multiplication per activation. Therefore, any reduction in computational cost results in reduced number of parameters. This means that with suitable factorization, we can end up with more disentangled parameters and therefore with faster training. Also, we can use the computational and memory savings to increase the filter-bank sizes of our network while maintaining our ability to train each model replica on a single computer.
items.zh: 在这里，我们探索在各种设置中分解卷积的其他方法，特别是为了增加解决方案的计算效率。由于Inception网络是全卷积的，每个权重对应每次激活的一次乘法。因此，任何计算成本的降低都会导致参数数量的减少。这意味着通过适当的分解，我们可以得到更解缠的参数，从而加快训练速度。此外，我们可以利用计算和内存的节省来增加网络的滤波器组大小，同时保持我们在单台计算机上训练每个模型副本的能力。

items.en: Convolutions with larger spatial filters (e.g. 5×5555\times 5 or 7×7777\times 7) tend to be disproportionally expensive in terms of computation. For example, a 5×5555\times 5 convolution with n𝑛n filters over a grid with m𝑚m filters is 25/9 = 2.78 times more computationally expensive than a 3×3333\times 3 convolution with the same number of filters. Of course, a 5×5555\times 5 filter can capture dependencies between signals between activations of units further away in the earlier layers, so a reduction of the geometric size of the filters comes at a large cost of expressiveness. However, we can ask whether a 5×5555\times 5 convolution could be replaced by a multi-layer network with less parameters with the same input size and output depth. If we zoom into the computation graph of the 5×5555\times 5 convolution, we see that each output looks like a small fully-connected network sliding over 5×5555\times 5 tiles over its input (see Figure 1).
items.zh: 具有较大空间滤波器（例如5×5或7×7）的卷积在计算上往往不成比例地昂贵。例如，在具有m个滤波器的网格上使用n个滤波器的5×5卷积，其计算成本是相同数量滤波器的3×3卷积的25/9 = 2.78倍。当然，5×5滤波器可以捕获早期层中更远单元激活之间的信号依赖关系，因此减小滤波器的几何尺寸会以表达能力为巨大代价。然而，我们可以问，是否可以用一个参数更少、输入大小和输出深度相同的多层网络来替代5×5卷积。如果我们放大5×5卷积的计算图，我们会看到每个输出看起来像一个小的全连接网络，在其输入上滑动5×5的图块（见图1）。

items.capZh: 图1：替代5×5卷积的迷你网络。

items.en: Since we are constructing a vision network, it seems natural to exploit translation invariance again and replace the fully connected component by a two layer convolutional architecture: the first layer is a 3×3333\times 3 convolution, the second is a fully connected layer on top of the 3×3333\times 3 output grid of the first layer (see Figure 1). Sliding this small network over the input activation grid boils down to replacing the 5×5555\times 5 convolution with two layers of 3×3333\times 3 convolution (compare Figure 4 with 5).
items.zh: 由于我们在构建视觉网络，利用平移不变性似乎是自然的，并用两层卷积架构替换全连接组件：第一层是3×3卷积，第二层是在第一层的3×3输出网格之上的全连接层（见图1）。将这个小型网络在输入激活网格上滑动，相当于用两个3×3卷积层替换5×5卷积（比较图4和图5）。

items.en: This setup clearly reduces the parameter count by sharing the weights between adjacent tiles. To analyze the expected computational cost savings, we will make a few simplifying assumptions that apply for the typical situations: We can assume that n=α​m𝑛𝛼𝑚n=\alpha m, that is that we want to change the number of activations/unit by a constant alpha factor. Since the 5×5555\times 5 convolution is aggregating, α𝛼\alpha is typically slightly larger than one (around 1.5 in the case of GoogLeNet). Having a two layer replacement for the 5×5555\times 5 layer, it seems reasonable to reach this expansion in two steps: increasing the number of filters by α𝛼\sqrt{\alpha} in both steps. In order to simplify our estimate by choosing α=1𝛼1\alpha=1 (no expansion), If we would naivly slide a network without reusing the computation between neighboring grid tiles, we would increase the computational cost. sliding this network can be represented by two 3×3333\times 3 convolutional layers which reuses the activations between adjacent tiles. This way, we end up with a net 9+925×\frac{9+9}{25}\times reduction of computation, resulting in a relative gain of 28%percent2828\% by this factorization. The exact same saving holds for the parameter count as each parameter is used exactly once in the computation of the activation of each unit. Still, this setup raises two general questions: Does this replacement result in any loss of expressiveness? If our main goal is to factorize the linear part of the computation, would it not suggest to keep linear activations in the first layer? We have ran several control experiments (for example see figure 2) and using linear activation was always inferior to using rectified linear units in all stages of the factorization. We attribute this gain to the enhanced space of variations that the network can learn especially if we batch-normalize [7] the output activations. One can see similar effects when using linear activations for the dimension reduction components.
items.zh: 这种设置通过共享相邻图块之间的权重，明显减少了参数数量。为了分析预期的计算成本节省，我们将做一些适用于典型情况的简化假设：我们可以假设n = αm，即我们希望通过一个常数因子α来改变激活/单元的数量。由于5×5卷积是聚合的，α通常略大于1（在GoogLeNet中约为1.5）。对于5×5层的两层替换，通过两步达到这种扩展似乎是合理的：在两步中都将滤波器数量增加√α。为了简化估计，我们选择α=1（无扩展）。如果我们天真地滑动网络而不重用相邻网格图块之间的计算，计算成本会增加。滑动这个网络可以表示为两个3×3卷积层，它们重用了相邻图块之间的激活。这样，我们最终得到9+9/25倍的计算减少，通过这种分解实现了28%的相对增益。参数数量也有完全相同的节省，因为每个参数在计算每个单元的激活时恰好使用一次。尽管如此，这种设置提出了两个一般性问题：这种替换是否会导致任何表达能力的损失？如果我们主要目标是分解计算的线性部分，是否建议在第一层保持线性激活？我们进行了几个控制实验（例如见图2），在分解的所有阶段，使用线性激活总是劣于使用修正线性单元。我们将这种增益归因于网络可以学习的增强的变化空间，特别是如果我们对输出激活进行批归一化[7]。当对降维组件使用线性激活时，也可以看到类似的效果。

items.capEn: Figure 2: One of several control experiments between two Inception models, one of them uses factorization into linear + ReLU layers, the other uses two ReLU layers. After 3.863.863.86 million operations, the former settles at 76.2%percent76.276.2\%, while the latter reaches 77.2%percent77.277.2\% top-1 Accuracy on the validation set.
items.capZh: 图2：两个Inception模型之间的一个控制实验，其中一个使用分解为线性+ReLU层，另一个使用两个ReLU层。经过386万次操作，前者在验证集上的top-1准确率达到76.2%，而后者达到77.2%。

full.secZh: 3.2 空间分解为非对称卷积

items.en: The above results suggest that convolutions with filters larger 3×3333\times 3 a might not be generally useful as they can always be reduced into a sequence of 3×3333\times 3 convolutional layers. Still we can ask the question whether one should factorize them into smaller, for example 2×2222\times 2 convolutions. However, it turns out that one can do even better than 2×2222\times 2 by using asymmetric convolutions, e.g. n×1𝑛1n\times 1. For example using a 3×1313\times 1 convolution followed by a 1×3131\times 3 convolution is equivalent to sliding a two layer network with the same receptive field as in a 3×3333\times 3 convolution (see figure 3). Still the two-layer solution is 33%percent3333\% cheaper for the same number of output filters, if the number of input and output filters is equal.
items.zh: 上述结果表明，滤波器大于3×3的卷积可能通常没有用处，因为它们总是可以简化为一系列3×3卷积层。但我们仍然可以问，是否应该将它们分解为更小的卷积，例如2×2卷积。然而，事实证明，通过使用非对称卷积（例如n×1）可以做得比2×2更好。例如，使用3×1卷积后接1×3卷积，相当于滑动一个具有与3×3卷积相同感受野的两层网络（见图3）。尽管如此，如果输入和输出滤波器数量相等，对于相同数量的输出滤波器，两层解决方案的成本降低了33%。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Mini-network replacing the 3×3333\times 3 convolutions. The lower layer of this network consists of a 3×1313\times 1 convolution with 333 output units.
items.capZh: 图3：替代3×3卷积的小型网络。该网络的下层由一个3×1卷积组成，输出3个单元。

items.en: By comparison, factorizing a 3×3333\times 3 convolution into a two 2×2222\times 2 convolution represents only a 11%percent1111\% saving of computation.
items.zh: 相比之下，将3×3卷积分解为两个2×2卷积仅节省11%的计算量。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Original Inception module as described in [20].
items.capZh: 图4：文献[20]中描述的原始Inception模块。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Inception modules where each 5×5555\times 5 convolution is replaced by two 3×3333\times 3 convolution, as suggested by principle 3 of Section 2.
items.capZh: 图5：Inception模块，其中每个5×5卷积被替换为两个3×3卷积，如第2节原则3所建议。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Inception modules after the factorization of the n×n𝑛𝑛n\times n convolutions. In our proposed architecture, we chose n=7𝑛7n=7 for the 17×17171717\times 17 grid. (The filter sizes are picked using principle 3)
items.capZh: 图6：对n×n卷积进行分解后的Inception模块。在我们提出的架构中，对于17×17网格，我们选择n=7。（滤波器大小根据原则3选择）

items.capEn: Figure 7: Inception modules with expanded the filter bank outputs. This architecture is used on the coarsest (8×8888\times 8) grids to promote high dimensional representations, as suggested by principle 2 of Section 2. We are using this solution only on the coarsest grid, since that is the place where producing high dimensional sparse representation is the most critical as the ratio of local processing (by 1×1111\times 1 convolutions) is increased compared to the spatial aggregation.
items.capZh: 图7：扩展滤波器组输出的Inception模块。该架构用于最粗糙的（8×8）网格，以促进高维表示，如第2节原则2所建议。我们仅在最粗糙的网格上使用此方案，因为在该处，与空间聚合相比，局部处理（通过1×1卷积）的比例增加，产生高维稀疏表示最为关键。

items.en: In theory, we could go even further and argue that one can replace any n×n𝑛𝑛n\times n convolution by a 1×n1𝑛1\times n convolution followed by a n×1𝑛1n\times 1 convolution and the computational cost saving increases dramatically as n𝑛n grows (see figure 6). In practice, we have found that employing this factorization does not work well on early layers, but it gives very good results on medium grid-sizes (On m×m𝑚𝑚m\times m feature maps, where m𝑚m ranges between 121212 and 202020). On that level, very good results can be achieved by using 1×7171\times 7 convolutions followed by 7×1717\times 1 convolutions.
items.zh: 理论上，我们可以更进一步，认为可以用1×n卷积后接n×1卷积替换任何n×n卷积，且随着n增长，计算成本节省显著增加（见图6）。实践中，我们发现这种分解在早期层效果不佳，但在中等网格尺寸（在m×m特征图上，m介于12到20之间）上效果很好。在该级别上，使用1×7卷积后接7×1卷积可以获得非常好的结果。

items.en: [20] has introduced the notion of auxiliary classifiers to improve the convergence of very deep networks. The original motivation was to push useful gradients to the lower layers to make them immediately useful and improve the convergence during training by combating the vanishing gradient problem in very deep networks. Also Lee et al[11] argues that auxiliary classifiers promote more stable learning and better convergence.
items.zh: 文献[20]引入了辅助分类器的概念以改善极深网络的收敛性。最初的动机是将有用的梯度推送到较低层，使其立即有用，并通过对抗极深网络中的梯度消失问题来改善训练过程中的收敛性。此外，Lee等人[11]认为辅助分类器促进更稳定的学习和更好的收敛。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Auxiliary classifier on top of the last 17×17171717\times 17 layer. Batch normalization[7] of the layers in the side head results in a 0.4%percent0.40.4\% absolute gain in top-111 accuracy. The lower axis shows the number of itertions performed, each with batch size 323232.
items.capZh: 图8：位于最后一个17×17层之上的辅助分类器。侧头中层的批量归一化[7]使top-1准确率绝对提升0.4%。下轴显示执行的迭代次数，每批次大小为32。

items.en: Interestingly, we found that auxiliary classifiers did not result in improved convergence early in the training: the training progression of network with and without side head looks virtually identical before both models reach high accuracy. Near the end of training, the network with the auxiliary branches starts to overtake the accuracy of the network without any auxiliary branch and reaches a slightly higher plateau.
items.zh: 有趣的是，我们发现辅助分类器在训练早期并未改善收敛性：带有和不带有侧头的网络的训练进程在两者达到高准确率之前几乎相同。在训练接近结束时，带有辅助分支的网络开始超越不带辅助分支的网络，并达到略高的平台期。

items.en: Also [20] used two side-heads at different stages in the network. The removal of the lower auxiliary branch did not have any adverse effect on the final quality of the network. Together with the earlier observation in the previous paragraph, this means that original the hypothesis of [20] that these branches help evolving the low-level features is most likely misplaced. Instead, we argue that the auxiliary classifiers act as regularizer. This is supported by the fact that the main classifier of the network performs better if the side branch is batch-normalized [7] or has a dropout layer. This also gives a weak supporting evidence for the conjecture that batch normalization acts as a regularizer.
items.zh: 此外，文献[20]在网络的不同阶段使用了两个侧头。移除较低辅助分支对网络的最终质量没有不利影响。结合上一段的早期观察，这意味着文献[20]关于这些分支有助于演化低层特征的原始假设很可能是不正确的。相反，我们认为辅助分类器起到正则化作用。这一观点得到以下事实的支持：如果侧分支进行了批量归一化[7]或具有dropout层，网络的主分类器性能更好。这也为批量归一化作为正则化器的猜想提供了弱支持证据。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Two alternative ways of reducing the grid size. The solution on the left violates the principle 1 of not introducing an representational bottleneck from Section 2. The version on the right is 333 times more expensive computationally.
items.capZh: 图9：减小网格尺寸的两种替代方式。左侧的解决方案违反了第2节原则1，即不引入表示瓶颈。右侧的版本计算成本高出3倍。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Inception module that reduces the grid-size while expands the filter banks. It is both cheap and avoids the representational bottleneck as is suggested by principle 1. The diagram on the right represents the same solution but from the perspective of grid sizes rather than the operations.
items.capZh: 图10：减小网格尺寸同时扩展滤波器组的Inception模块。它既廉价又避免了原则1所建议的表示瓶颈。右侧的图示表示相同的解决方案，但从网格尺寸而非操作的角度。

items.en: Traditionally, convolutional networks used some pooling operation to decrease the grid size of the feature maps. In order to avoid a representational bottleneck, before applying maximum or average pooling the activation dimension of the network filters is expanded. For example, starting a d×d𝑑𝑑d\times d grid with k𝑘k filters, if we would like to arrive at a d2×d2𝑑2𝑑2\frac{d}{2}\times\frac{d}{2} grid with 2​k2𝑘2k filters, we first need to compute a stride-1 convolution with 2​k2𝑘2k filters and then apply an additional pooling step. This means that the overall computational cost is dominated by the expensive convolution on the larger grid using 2​d2​k22superscript𝑑2superscript𝑘22d^{2}k^{2} operations. One possibility would be to switch to pooling with convolution and therefore resulting in 2​(d2)2​k22superscript𝑑22superscript𝑘22(\frac{d}{2})^{2}k^{2} reducing the computational cost by a quarter. However, this creates a representational bottlenecks as the overall dimensionality of the representation drops to (d2)2​ksuperscript𝑑22𝑘(\frac{d}{2})^{2}k resulting in less expressive networks (see Figure 9). Instead of doing so, we suggest another variant the reduces the computational cost even further while removing the representational bottleneck. (see Figure 10). We can use two parallel stride 2 blocks: P𝑃P and C𝐶C. P𝑃P is a pooling layer (either average or maximum pooling) the activation, both of them are stride 222 the filter banks of which are concatenated as in figure 10.
items.zh: 传统上，卷积网络使用某些池化操作来减小特征图的网格尺寸。为了避免表示瓶颈，在应用最大或平均池化之前，网络滤波器的激活维度被扩展。例如，从具有k个滤波器的d×d网格开始，如果我们希望得到具有2k个滤波器的d/2×d/2网格，我们首先需要计算具有2k个滤波器的步长为1的卷积，然后应用额外的池化步骤。这意味着总体计算成本主要由在较大网格上使用2d²k²次操作的昂贵卷积决定。一种可能性是切换到带卷积的池化，从而得到2(d/2)²k²，将计算成本减少四分之一。然而，这会产生表示瓶颈，因为表示的总体维度降至(d/2)²k，导致网络表达能力降低（见图9）。我们建议另一种变体，进一步降低计算成本，同时消除表示瓶颈（见图10）。我们可以使用两个并行的步长为2的块：P和C。P是池化层（平均或最大池化），两者都是步长为2，其滤波器组如图10所示进行拼接。

items.en: Here we are connecting the dots from above and propose a new architecture with improved performance on the ILSVRC 2012 classification benchmark. The layout of our network is given in table 1. Note that we have factorized the traditional 7×7777\times 7 convolution into three 3×3333\times 3 convolutions based on the same ideas as described in section 3.1. For the Inception part of the network, we have 333 traditional inception modules at the 35×35353535\times 35 with 288288288 filters each. This is reduced to a 17×17171717\times 17 grid with 768768768 filters using the grid reduction technique described in section 5. This is is followed by 555 instances of the factorized inception modules as depicted in figure 5. This is reduced to a 8×8×12808812808\times 8\times 1280 grid with the grid reduction technique depicted in figure 10. At the coarsest 8×8888\times 8 level, we have two Inception modules as depicted in figure 6, with a concatenated output filter bank size of 2048 for each tile. The detailed structure of the network, including the sizes of filter banks inside the Inception modules, is given in the supplementary material, given in the model.txt that is in the tar-file of this submission. However, we have observed that the quality of the network is relatively stable to variations as long as the principles from Section 2 are observed. Although our network is 424242 layers deep, our computation cost is only about 2.52.52.5 higher than that of GoogLeNet and it is still much more efficient than VGGNet.
items.zh: 这里我们综合上述内容，提出一种在ILSVRC 2012分类基准上性能提升的新架构。我们的网络布局见表1。注意，我们基于第3.1节描述的相同思想，将传统的7×7卷积分解为三个3×3卷积。对于网络的Inception部分，我们在35×35网格上有3个传统的Inception模块，每个有288个滤波器。通过第5节描述的网格缩减技术，将其缩减为17×17网格，有768个滤波器。随后是5个如图5所示的分解Inception模块实例。通过图10描述的网格缩减技术，将其缩减为8×8×1280网格。在最粗糙的8×8级别，我们有两个如图6所示的Inception模块，每个图块的拼接输出滤波器组大小为2048。网络内部Inception模块中滤波器组大小的详细结构见补充材料，即本提交tar文件中的model.txt。然而，我们观察到，只要遵守第2节的原则，网络质量相对稳定。尽管我们的网络有42层深，但计算成本仅比GoogLeNet高约2.5倍，且仍远低于VGGNet。

full.secZh: 7 通过标签平滑进行模型正则化

items.en: Here we propose a mechanism to regularize the classifier layer by estimating the marginalized effect of label-dropout during training.
items.zh: 这里我们提出一种机制，通过在训练期间估计标签丢弃的边缘效应来正则化分类器层。

items.en: For each training example x𝑥x, our model computes the probability of each label k∈{1​…​K}𝑘1…𝐾k\in\{1\ldots K\}: p​(k|x)=exp⁡(zk)∑i=1Kexp⁡(zi)𝑝conditional𝑘𝑥subscript𝑧𝑘superscriptsubscript𝑖1𝐾subscript𝑧𝑖p(k|x)=\frac{\exp(z_{k})}{\sum_{i=1}^{K}\exp(z_{i})}. Here, zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} are the logits or unnormalized log-probabilities. Consider the ground-truth distribution over labels q​(k|x)𝑞conditional𝑘𝑥q(k|x) for this training example, normalized so that ∑kq​(k|x)=1subscript𝑘𝑞conditional𝑘𝑥1\sum_{k}q(k|x)=1. For brevity, let us omit the dependence of p𝑝p and q𝑞q on example x𝑥x. We define the loss for the example as the cross entropy: ℓ=−∑k=1Klog⁡(p​(k))​q​(k)ℓsuperscriptsubscript𝑘1𝐾𝑝𝑘𝑞𝑘\ell=-\sum_{k=1}^{K}\log(p(k))q(k). Minimizing this is equivalent to maximizing the expected log-likelihood of a label, where the label is selected according to its ground-truth distribution q​(k)𝑞𝑘q(k). Cross-entropy loss is differentiable with respect to the logits zksubscript𝑧𝑘z_{k} and thus can be used for gradient training of deep models. The gradient has a rather simple form: ∂ℓ∂zk=p​(k)−q​(k)ℓsubscript𝑧𝑘𝑝𝑘𝑞𝑘\frac{\partial\ell}{\partial z_{k}}=p(k)-q(k), which is bounded between −11-1 and 111.
items.zh: 对于每个训练样本x，我们的模型计算每个标签k∈{1…K}的概率：p(k|x)=exp(z_k)/∑_{i=1}^K exp(z_i)。这里，z_i是logits或未归一化的对数概率。考虑该训练样本的标签真实分布q(k|x)，归一化使得∑_k q(k|x)=1。为简洁起见，我们省略p和q对样本x的依赖。我们将该样本的损失定义为交叉熵：ℓ=-∑_{k=1}^K log(p(k)) q(k)。最小化此损失等价于最大化标签的期望对数似然，其中标签根据其真实分布q(k)选择。交叉熵损失关于logits z_k可微，因此可用于深度模型的梯度训练。梯度具有相当简单的形式：∂ℓ/∂z_k = p(k)-q(k)，其范围在-1到1之间。

items.en: Consider the case of a single ground-truth label y𝑦y, so that q​(y)=1𝑞𝑦1q(y)=1 and q​(k)=0𝑞𝑘0q(k)=0 for all k≠y𝑘𝑦k\neq y. In this case, minimizing the cross entropy is equivalent to maximizing the log-likelihood of the correct label. For a particular example x𝑥x with label y𝑦y, the log-likelihood is maximized for q​(k)=δk,y𝑞𝑘subscript𝛿𝑘𝑦q(k)=\delta_{k,y}, where δk,ysubscript𝛿𝑘𝑦\delta_{k,y} is Dirac delta, which equals 111 for k=y𝑘𝑦k=y and 00 otherwise. This maximum is not achievable for finite zksubscript𝑧𝑘z_{k} but is approached if zy≫zkmuch-greater-thansubscript𝑧𝑦subscript𝑧𝑘z_{y}\gg z_{k} for all k≠y𝑘𝑦k\neq y – that is, if the logit corresponding to the ground-truth label is much great than all other logits. This, however, can cause two problems. First, it may result in over-fitting: if the model learns to assign full probability to the ground-truth label for each training example, it is not guaranteed to generalize. Second, it encourages the differences between the largest logit and all others to become large, and this, combined with the bounded gradient ∂ℓ∂zkℓsubscript𝑧𝑘\frac{\partial\ell}{\partial z_{k}}, reduces the ability of the model to adapt. Intuitively, this happens because the model becomes too confident about its predictions.
items.zh: 考虑单个真实标签y的情况，因此q(y)=1且对于所有k≠y，q(k)=0。在这种情况下，最小化交叉熵等价于最大化正确标签的对数似然。对于具有标签y的特定样本x，当q(k)=δ_{k,y}时对数似然最大，其中δ_{k,y}是狄拉克δ函数，当k=y时等于1，否则为0。该最大值对于有限的z_k不可达，但如果对于所有k≠y有z_y >> z_k，即对应于真实标签的logit远大于所有其他logit，则接近该最大值。然而，这可能导致两个问题。首先，可能导致过拟合：如果模型学会为每个训练样本分配全部概率给真实标签，则不能保证泛化。其次，它鼓励最大logit与所有其他logit之间的差异变大，这与有界梯度∂ℓ/∂z_k结合，降低了模型适应能力。直观上，这是因为模型对其预测过于自信。

items.en: We propose a mechanism for encouraging the model to be less confident. While this may not be desired if the goal is to maximize the log-likelihood of training labels, it does regularize the model and makes it more adaptable. The method is very simple. Consider a distribution over labels u​(k)𝑢𝑘u(k), independent of the training example x𝑥x, and a smoothing parameter ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon. For a training example with ground-truth label y𝑦y, we replace the label distribution q​(k|x)=δk,y𝑞conditional𝑘𝑥subscript𝛿𝑘𝑦q(k|x)=\delta_{k,y} with
items.zh: 我们提出一种机制鼓励模型不那么自信。虽然如果目标是最大化训练标签的对数似然，这可能不是期望的，但它确实正则化模型并使其更具适应性。该方法非常简单。考虑一个与训练样本x无关的标签分布u(k)，以及一个平滑参数ε。对于具有真实标签y的训练样本，我们将标签分布q(k|x)=δ_{k,y}替换为

items.en: which is a mixture of the original ground-truth distribution q​(k|x)𝑞conditional𝑘𝑥q(k|x) and the fixed distribution u​(k)𝑢𝑘u(k), with weights 1−ϵ1italic-ϵ1-\epsilon and ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon, respectively. This can be seen as the distribution of the label k𝑘k obtained as follows: first, set it to the ground-truth label k=y𝑘𝑦k=y; then, with probability ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon, replace k𝑘k with a sample drawn from the distribution u​(k)𝑢𝑘u(k). We propose to use the prior distribution over labels as u​(k)𝑢𝑘u(k). In our experiments, we used the uniform distribution u​(k)=1/K𝑢𝑘1𝐾u(k)=1/K, so that
items.zh: 这是原始真实分布q(k|x)与固定分布u(k)的混合，权重分别为1-ε和ε。这可以看作标签k的分布，通过以下方式获得：首先，将其设置为真实标签k=y；然后，以概率ε，将k替换为从分布u(k)中抽取的样本。我们建议使用标签的先验分布作为u(k)。在我们的实验中，我们使用均匀分布u(k)=1/K，因此

items.en: We refer to this change in ground-truth label distribution as label-smoothing regularization, or LSR.
items.zh: 我们将这种真实标签分布的变化称为标签平滑正则化（LSR）。

items.en: Note that LSR achieves the desired goal of preventing the largest logit from becoming much larger than all others. Indeed, if this were to happen, then a single q​(k)𝑞𝑘q(k) would approach 111 while all others would approach 00. This would result in a large cross-entropy with q′​(k)superscript𝑞′𝑘q^{\prime}(k) because, unlike q​(k)=δk,y𝑞𝑘subscript𝛿𝑘𝑦q(k)=\delta_{k,y}, all q′​(k)superscript𝑞′𝑘q^{\prime}(k) have a positive lower bound.
items.zh: 注意，LSR实现了防止最大logit远大于其他logit的预期目标。确实，如果发生这种情况，那么单个q(k)将接近1，而所有其他q(k)将接近0。这将导致与q'(k)的交叉熵很大，因为与q(k)=δ_{k,y}不同，所有q'(k)都有一个正的下界。

items.en: Another interpretation of LSR can be obtained by considering the cross entropy:
items.zh: LSR的另一种解释可以通过考虑交叉熵得到：

items.en: Thus, LSR is equivalent to replacing a single cross-entropy loss H​(q,p)𝐻𝑞𝑝H(q,p) with a pair of such losses H​(q,p)𝐻𝑞𝑝H(q,p) and H​(u,p)𝐻𝑢𝑝H(u,p). The second loss penalizes the deviation of predicted label distribution p𝑝p from the prior u𝑢u, with the relative weight ϵ1−ϵitalic-ϵ1italic-ϵ\frac{\epsilon}{1-\epsilon}. Note that this deviation could be equivalently captured by the KL divergence, since H​(u,p)=DK​L​(u∥p)+H​(u)𝐻𝑢𝑝subscript𝐷𝐾𝐿conditional𝑢𝑝𝐻𝑢H(u,p)=D_{KL}(u\|p)+H(u) and H​(u)𝐻𝑢H(u) is fixed. When u𝑢u is the uniform distribution, H​(u,p)𝐻𝑢𝑝H(u,p) is a measure of how dissimilar the predicted distribution p𝑝p is to uniform, which could also be measured (but not equivalently) by negative entropy −H​(p)𝐻𝑝-H(p); we have not experimented with this approach.
items.zh: 因此，LSR等价于将单个交叉熵损失H(q,p)替换为一对这样的损失H(q,p)和H(u,p)。第二个损失惩罚预测标签分布p与先验u的偏差，相对权重为ε/(1-ε)。注意，这种偏差可以通过KL散度等价地捕获，因为H(u,p)=D_KL(u∥p)+H(u)，且H(u)是固定的。当u是均匀分布时，H(u,p)衡量预测分布p与均匀分布的不相似程度，这也可以通过负熵-H(p)（但不等价）来衡量；我们尚未尝试这种方法。

items.en: In our ImageNet experiments with K=1000𝐾1000K=1000 classes, we used u​(k)=1/1000𝑢𝑘11000u(k)=1/1000 and ϵ=0.1italic-ϵ0.1\epsilon=0.1. For ILSVRC 2012, we have found a consistent improvement of about 0.2%percent0.20.2\% absolute both for top-111 error and the top-555 error (cf. Table 3).
items.zh: 在我们使用K=1000个类别的ImageNet实验中，我们使用了u(k)=1/1000和ε=0.1。对于ILSVRC 2012，我们发现top-1错误率和top-5错误率均一致提高了约0.2%（绝对值）（见表3）。

items.en: We have trained our networks with stochastic gradient utilizing the TensorFlow [1] distributed machine learning system using 505050 replicas running each on a NVidia Kepler GPU with batch size 323232 for 100100100 epochs. Our earlier experiments used momentum [19] with a decay of 0.90.90.9, while our best models were achieved using RMSProp [21] with decay of 0.90.90.9 and ϵ=1.0italic-ϵ1.0\epsilon=1.0. We used a learning rate of 0.0450.0450.045, decayed every two epoch using an exponential rate of 0.940.940.94. In addition, gradient clipping [14] with threshold 2.02.02.0 was found to be useful to stabilize the training. Model evaluations are performed using a running average of the parameters computed over time.
items.zh: 我们使用随机梯度训练网络，利用TensorFlow [1]分布式机器学习系统，在50个副本上运行，每个副本使用NVidia Kepler GPU，批量大小为32，训练100个epoch。我们早期的实验使用动量为0.9的动量法[19]，而我们最好的模型是使用RMSProp [21]实现的，衰减为0.9，ε=1.0。我们使用学习率0.045，每两个epoch以指数衰减率0.94衰减。此外，发现阈值为2.0的梯度裁剪[14]有助于稳定训练。模型评估使用随时间计算的参数运行平均值进行。

items.en: A typical use-case of vision networks is for the the post-classification of detection, for example in the Multibox [4] context. This includes the analysis of a relative small patch of the image containing a single object with some context. The tasks is to decide whether the center part of the patch corresponds to some object and determine the class of the object if it does. The challenge is that objects tend to be relatively small and low-resolution. This raises the question of how to properly deal with lower resolution input.
items.zh: 视觉网络的一个典型用例是检测的后分类，例如在Multibox [4]上下文中。这包括分析包含单个对象及其一些上下文的相对较小的图像块。任务是判断该块的中心部分是否对应于某个对象，如果是，则确定该对象的类别。挑战在于对象往往相对较小且分辨率低。这引发了如何正确处理较低分辨率输入的问题。

items.en: The common wisdom is that models employing higher resolution receptive fields tend to result in significantly improved recognition performance. However it is important to distinguish between the effect of the increased resolution of the first layer receptive field and the effects of larger model capacitance and computation. If we just change the resolution of the input without further adjustment to the model, then we end up using computationally much cheaper models to solve more difficult tasks. Of course, it is natural, that these solutions loose out already because of the reduced computational effort. In order to make an accurate assessment, the model needs to analyze vague hints in order to be able to “hallucinate” the fine details. This is computationally costly. The question remains therefore: how much does higher input resolution helps if the computational effort is kept constant. One simple way to ensure constant effort is to reduce the strides of the first two layer in the case of lower resolution input, or by simply removing the first pooling layer of the network.
items.zh: 普遍观点是，使用更高分辨率感受野的模型往往能显著提高识别性能。然而，区分第一层感受野分辨率提高的影响与更大模型容量和计算的影响很重要。如果我们只改变输入分辨率而不对模型进行进一步调整，那么最终会使用计算上便宜得多的模型来解决更困难的任务。当然，这些解决方案由于计算量减少而自然失败。为了做出准确评估，模型需要分析模糊的线索，以便能够“幻觉”出精细细节。这计算成本很高。因此，问题仍然存在：如果计算量保持不变，更高的输入分辨率有多大帮助？一种确保计算量不变的简单方法是在较低分辨率输入的情况下减少前两层的步长，或者直接移除网络的第一个池化层。

items.en: For this purpose we have performed the following three experiments:
items.zh: 为此，我们进行了以下三个实验：

items.en: 299×299299299299\times 299 receptive field with stride 222 and maximum pooling after the first layer.
items.zh: 299×299感受野，步长为2，第一层后使用最大池化。

items.en: 151×151151151151\times 151 receptive field with stride 111 and maximum pooling after the first layer.
items.zh: 151×151感受野，步长为1，第一层后使用最大池化。

items.en: 79×79797979\times 79 receptive field with stride 111 and without pooling after the first layer.
items.zh: 79×79感受野，步长为1，第一层后不使用池化。

items.en: All three networks have almost identical computational cost. Although the third network is slightly cheaper, the cost of the pooling layer is marginal and (within 1%percent11\% of the total cost of the)network. In each case, the networks were trained until convergence and their quality was measured on the validation set of the ImageNet ILSVRC 2012 classification benchmark. The results can be seen in table 2. Although the lower-resolution networks take longer to train, the quality of the final result is quite close to that of their higher resolution counterparts.
items.zh: 所有三个网络的计算成本几乎相同。尽管第三个网络稍微便宜一些，但池化层的成本很小（在总成本的1%以内）。在每种情况下，网络都训练至收敛，并在ImageNet ILSVRC 2012分类基准的验证集上评估其质量。结果见表2。尽管较低分辨率的网络训练时间更长，但最终结果的质量与较高分辨率网络非常接近。

items.en: However, if one would just naively reduce the network size according to the input resolution, then network would perform much more poorly. However this would an unfair comparison as we would are comparing a 16 times cheaper model on a more difficult task.
items.zh: 然而，如果只是根据输入分辨率天真地减小网络规模，那么网络性能会差得多。但这将是不公平的比较，因为我们是在用便宜16倍的模型处理更困难的任务。

items.en: Also these results of table 2 suggest, one might consider using dedicated high-cost low resolution networks for smaller objects in the R-CNN [5] context.
items.zh: 此外，表2的结果表明，在R-CNN [5]上下文中，可以考虑对小物体使用专用的高成本低分辨率网络。

items.en: All our evaluations are done on the 48238 non-blacklisted examples on the ILSVRC-2012 validation set, as suggested by [16]. We have evaluated all the 50000 examples as well and the results were roughly 0.1% worse in top-5 error and around 0.2% in top-1 error. In the upcoming version of this paper, we will verify our ensemble result on the test set, but at the time of our last evaluation of BN-Inception in spring [7] indicates that the test and validation set error tends to correlate very well.
items.zh: 我们所有的评估都是在ILSVRC-2012验证集的48238个非黑名单样本上进行的，如[16]所建议。我们也评估了所有50000个样本，结果在top-5错误率上大约差0.1%，在top-1错误率上大约差0.2%。在本文的后续版本中，我们将在测试集上验证我们的集成结果，但根据我们上次在春季对BN-Inception的评估[7]，测试集和验证集错误率往往非常相关。

items.en: We have provided several design principles to scale up convolutional networks and studied them in the context of the Inception architecture. This guidance can lead to high performance vision networks that have a relatively modest computation cost compared to simpler, more monolithic architectures. Our highest quality version of Inception-v3 reaches 21.2%percent21.221.2\%, top-111 and 5.6%percent5.65.6\% top-5 error for single crop evaluation on the ILSVR 2012 classification, setting a new state of the art. This is achieved with relatively modest (2.5×2.5\times) increase in computational cost compared to the network described in Ioffe et al [7]. Still our solution uses much less computation than the best published results based on denser networks: our model outperforms the results of He et al [6] – cutting the top-555 (top-111) error by 25%percent2525\% (14%percent1414\%) relative, respectively – while being six times cheaper computationally and using at least five times less parameters (estimated). Our ensemble of four Inception-v3 models reaches 3.5%percent3.53.5\% with multi-crop evaluation reaches 3.5%percent3.53.5\% top-555 error which represents an over 25%percent2525\% reduction to the best published results and is almost half of the error of ILSVRC 2014 winining GoogLeNet ensemble.
items.zh: 我们提供了几个设计原则来扩展卷积网络，并在Inception架构的背景下进行了研究。这些指导可以产生高性能的视觉网络，与更简单、更单一的架构相比，其计算成本相对适中。我们最高质量的Inception-v3版本在ILSVR 2012分类的单裁剪评估中达到了21.2%的top-1错误率和5.6%的top-5错误率，创下了新的最佳水平。与Ioffe等人[7]描述的网络相比，这是通过相对适中的计算成本增加（2.5倍）实现的。尽管如此，我们的解决方案使用的计算量远少于基于更密集网络的最佳发布结果：我们的模型优于He等人[6]的结果——分别将top-5（top-1）错误率相对降低了25%（14%）——同时计算成本便宜六倍，且参数至少少五倍（估计）。我们的四个Inception-v3模型集成在多裁剪评估中达到了3.5%的top-5错误率，这比最佳发布结果降低了超过25%，几乎是ILSVRC 2014获胜的GoogLeNet集成错误率的一半。

items.en: We have also demonstrated that high quality results can be reached with receptive field resolution as low as 79×79797979\times 79. This might prove to be helpful in systems for detecting relatively small objects. We have studied how factorizing convolutions and aggressive dimension reductions inside neural network can result in networks with relatively low computational cost while maintaining high quality. The combination of lower parameter count and additional regularization with batch-normalized auxiliary classifiers and label-smoothing allows for training high quality networks on relatively modest sized training sets.
items.zh: 我们还证明了，使用低至79×79的感受野分辨率也能达到高质量结果。这可能有助于检测相对较小物体的系统。我们研究了如何通过分解卷积和网络内部的激进降维，在保持高质量的同时实现相对较低的计算成本。更少的参数数量与额外的正则化（如批量归一化的辅助分类器和标签平滑）相结合，使得在相对较小的训练集上训练高质量网络成为可能。
